description_long: This is a modern, white residential house set within a landscaped yard featuring a variety of trees and shrubs. The house has a flat roof and a clean, cubic architectural style, with large windows and a minimalist facade. A distinctive, irregularly shaped swimming pool is situated in the backyard, surrounded by a paved area and additional greenery. The front yard is lined with small, colorful trees and bushes, creating a welcoming approach to the main entrance. The property is enclosed by a low boundary, and the overall layout emphasizes open space and outdoor living. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a focus on simplicity and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a swimming pool and colorful trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swimming pool, potted plants, and the house's flat roof with adjacent greenery.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical rows of small trees, and the house's minimalist facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, more trees, and the house's rear elevation.
description_view_3: Backyard view focusing on the swimming pool, patio area, and the rear of the house with visible garden elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, no visible steps, and flanked by small decorative trees
